title: 'Congress must investigate': More stories of gross Navy food spark outrage
shortDescription: The Navy denied there was a shortage of food on board U.S. ships in the Middle East. But fresh food is running out between restocks, officials said.

title: Inside Trump's globetrotting third-country removal program
shortDescription: A 43-year-old Cambodian man describes being sent by the United States to an Eswatini prison for over five months.

title: Mahan addresses how he plans to navigate his relationship with Trump.
shortDescription: San Jose Mayor Matt Mahan explains how he would navigate working with President Trump if elected California governor, as federal involvement in key state issues continues.

title: Special US passports to feature Trump portrait
shortDescription: A limited-edition U.S. passport will be released to commemorate America's 250th birthday. The inside cover features President Donald Trump's portrait.

title: Senate Republicans block measure to curb Trump's power to invade Cuba
shortDescription: Trump has been hinting at military action in Cuba, prompting anxiety among Democrats, who tried to block him with a war powers vote.

title: See pageantry and protocol at historic White House state dinner
shortDescription: President Donald Trump and First Lady Melania Trump hosted King Charles and Queen Camilla at the White House for a state dinner on April 28, 2026.

title: King Charles meets Trump in historic visit
shortDescription: President Donald Trump hosts King Charles III at the White House as tensions rise over Iran and NATO during a rare state visit.

title: Hear King Charles' rare address to Congress
shortDescription: "Ours is a partnership born out of dispute, but no less strong for it." King Charles III made a speech to Congress emphasizing the U.S.-U.K. alliance.

title: Trump's approval rating falls to lowest of his second term in new poll
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's approval rating has fallen to 34%, the lowest of this term, due to the economy and war, according to new Reuters/Ipsos poll.

title: Longtime Trump ally objects to taxpayers funding White House ballroom
shortDescription: Florida GOP Sen. Rick Scott, a fierce ally of President Donald Trump, is against taxpayers funding a proposed $400 million ballroom Trump backs.

title: Trump jokes about marriage to Melania
shortDescription: President Trump quipped that his marriage to Melania won't last as long as his parents' marriage.

title: Former FBI Director James Comey, a Trump target, indicted again
shortDescription: Former FBI Director James Comey has been indicted for a second time, after a judge threw out an earlier indictment in November.

title: Jimmy Kimmel could face another First Amendment battle with FCC
shortDescription: Officials called for ABC to punish Jimmy Kimmel for a remark about the first lady, but an expert said it was constitutionally-protected speech.

title: Jimmy Kimmel says his joke was on Trumps' age gap. How old are they?
shortDescription: Jimmy Kimmel said his joke calling Melania Trump an "expectant widow" was a nod to their age gap, not a "call to violence. See their ages.

title: Is the White House honey for sale? Melania Trump reveals new beehive
shortDescription: First Lady Melania Trump has added a beehive to the South Lawn of the White House. What is the purpose of it, and can you purchase the honey?

title: Mamdani responds after billionaire slams NYC mayor's rich tax video
shortDescription: Last week, Griffin's company, Citadel LLC put out a statement to its employees slamming the use of the CEO's $238 million home in Mamdani's video.

title: Trump says he can’t be so concerned about political violence
shortDescription: Even considering the assassinations of presidents in the past, the spread of political violence in the modern era is unprecedented.

title: Trump calls conspiracy theories about staged shooting 'a tough sell'
shortDescription: Trump appeared on "60 Minutes" with Norah O'Donnell after the White House Correspondents' dinner. She asked him about conspiracies that it was staged.

title: Ballroom filing says preservation group has 'Trump Derangement Syndrome'
shortDescription: The acting attorney general cites the shooting attack at the White House correspondents’ dinner in U.S. District Court filing.
